map.title: Sète, within reach

calculator.title: Calculate your stay
calculator.subtitle: Indicative price — contact us for an exact quote and availability.
calculator.disclaimer: Indicative price. Final price confirmed at booking.

traveler.a: You can book directly via our Airbnb listings by clicking 'View listing', or contact us using the form below for a direct booking.
It depends on the property. Pet policy is specified in each listing. Feel free to contact us for more details.
Our policy is flexible. Cancellation conditions vary by booking platform and are always clearly stated before confirmation.

traveler.q: What are the check-in and check-out times?
traveler.a: Check-in is from 4pm, check-out by 11am. Flexible times may be arranged based on availability.
Yes, clean sheets and towels are included in all our properties at no extra charge.

owner.q: How much do your services cost?
owner.a: Our packages and rates are detailed in the section above. We offer several service levels to suit your needs.

owner.q: Can I still use my property personally?
owner.a: Absolutely. You retain full control of your calendar — just let us know your blocked dates in advance.
We carry out an inventory check at each checkout. Security deposits are managed via the platforms, and we handle any disputes.

owner.q: Which platforms do you list on?
owner.a: We manage your listings on Airbnb, Booking.com and Abritel, optimising pricing and content to maximise occupancy.
We can typically begin managing your property within 2 weeks of signing the management agreement.
